cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the text carefully. The question is asking how many Palestinian prisoners had been released by Wednesday. The first paragraph says that Israel freed 26 Palestinian prisoners early Wednesday, and this was the second of four groups to be released. So the first group must have been released before Wednesday, and the second was released on Wednesday. The total number of prisoners to be released is 104, in four rounds over the coming months. The second paragraph describes the reaction in Gaza and the West Bank. The 5 prisoners released to Gaza and 21 released to the West Bank. 5 + 21 = 26. So the 26 released on Wednesday are split between Gaza and the West Bank. The answer must
